name: Cherry Springs State Park
description: One of the darkest locations in the eastern United States, located on a mountaintop in Pennsylvania's Susquehannock State Forest. Despite being within a day's drive of 60 million people, the park's 2,300-foot elevation and surrounding forestland create surprisingly dark skies. It is a major destination for amateur astronomers from the US East Coast and hosts star parties drawing thousands of participants throughout the summer months.
